case_title: FANNIE CHAN VS. ROBIN DOSANJH, ALSO KNOWN AS RAVINDER KAUR

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, FANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBIN DOSANJH, ALSO KNOWN AS RAVINDER KAUR DOSANJH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 LEE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94112 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, FANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBIN DOSANJH, ALSO KNOWN AS RAVINDER KAUR DOSANJH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
